title: elaphoglossum biolleyi
intro: Elaphoglossum biolleyi, also known as the Biolley's Elaphoglossum or Elaphoglossum biolleyi, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Costa Rica and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum biolleyi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
